authors: Al-Kaisy A, Van Buyten JP, Carganillo R, Caraway D, Gliner B, Subbaroyan J, Panwar C, Rotte A, Amirdelfan K, Kapural L
title: 10 kHz SCS therapy for chronic pain, effects on opioid usage: Post hoc analysis of data from two prospective studies
study_question: Does 10 kHz SCS therapy reduce opioid dosage and pain in chronic pain patients?
population_assessed: Subjects with chronic low back pain and/or leg pain
outcome_measures: Opioid dose (MME/day), back and leg pain (VAS)
inclusion_criteria: Chronic back/leg pain, VAS ≥5 cm, refractory to conservative therapy, ODI 41-80.
answer_to_study_question: Yes, 10 kHz SCS significantly reduced opioid dosage and maintained pain relief.
